title: Natural Relief for Smokers: 7 Herbal Tonics for Bleeding Mouth Spots
description: Echinacea purpurea tinctures can help with bleeding spots in the mouth due to their anti-inflammatory properties and high content of compounds like alkylamides and glycosides. These constituents help to reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and promote healing in the affected area. When taken internally, Echinacea purpurea tinctures can help to soothe the mouth and reduce bleeding by increasing blood flow and promoting tissue repair.
